Document:
# QAUATA-CLASS CGP SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] APU, Plasma
# Shuttle Brief
"A Small sized vessel specializing in CGP operations. as well as a medical lab with cryopod."
# Ship Functions
ship functions
# Cryogenics
This Freezer and Pump are linked up to your Cryo System. Set these on to enable the use of your Cryopod for healing CGP Officers who are in a state of excessive damage.
[textlink="Cryogenics" link="Cryogenics"/]

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
